summary: Detected concentrated token movement from a high-activity wallet within a short window, consistent with position unwind or pre-listing distribution.

evidence.reason: Single transfer of 42% of the wallet's balance, far above its 30-day median transfer size.
Transaction frequency spiked 6x versus the trailing weekly average.

humanExplanation: This wallet just moved a large share of its holdings in one transaction and has been far more active than usual. That pattern often precedes a sell-off or redistribution, but on its own it is not proof of malicious intent. We recommend adding it to a watchlist and re-checking if a second large transfer follows.
